title: Epistola Suite Helm values
description: Partial schema: constrains the datasource/migration wiring that has hard render-time requirements. Other values are validated by the templates.

type.description: Which database the chart connects to. The chart never provisions one.

existingSecret.description: Name of the Secret holding the password; required for database.type=external.

registrationId.description: Lowercase alphanumeric only. Rendered into an env-var segment and used verbatim as the login redirect-URI segment (/login/oauth2/code/<registrationId>); Spring lowercases the registration id from env vars, so uppercase here would diverge from the redirect URI. Provider-neutral.

existingSecret.description: Name of the Secret holding the OIDC client secret; required when oidc.enabled is true.

issuerUri.description: OIDC issuer URI; required when oidc.enabled is true.
